445 ROUTE_PRVDR_HC_EXCHG_INFO_CD ROUTE_PRVDR_HC_EXCHG_INFO_CD Provider Trans - Health Info Exchange CHAR 1 This column documents whether the transmission route of patient's current reconciled medication list to subsequent provider was via a health information exchange. 0 = No
1 = Yes
^ = Blank
